verdict: An exceptionally fluid and well-structured Easy chart with natural foot flow, though it contains a couple of slightly advanced patterns for beginners.

issues.problem: Overlapping holds (HOLD L starting at 44.728 and HOLD U starting at 44.966) create a co-hold, which is generally too complex for an Easy chart.
The 7-note eighth-note stream (R-U-D-L-R-U-D) has perfect physical alternation but represents a minor difficulty spike for Easy players.
A tap note (R at 48.536) occurs while another pad (U) is held, which can be mechanically confusing for beginners.
